claims.description: The root causes and production fixes are identified at the deterministic matcher and learner send boundary, including the original light-practice no-op, broad keyword interception, and non-refreshing boolean clarification.

Behavior-first boundary coverage proves exact neon and learn-more declaratives, more questions, all submit mechanisms, editing then submit, literal and named closed-catalog jumps, consecutive clarification refresh, exact route params, and interactive 360px behavior.
Immutable machine-readable original RED, GREEN, production-only REVERT, RESTORE, and independent-review RED/GREEN outputs plus all required validation results are preserved.
The implementation remains deterministic and deliberately excludes richer semantic classification, multilingual corpus expansion, and named topic/session targeting.
